description_long: This object depicts a male construction worker dressed in a light blue uniform with white and pink reflective stripes on the jacket and pants. He is wearing a yellow safety helmet and matching yellow work boots, with brown gloves covering his hands. The jacket features a visible patch on the left chest and a large rectangular label on the back, suggesting company or safety information. The figure's attire is typical for urban construction sites, prioritizing visibility and protection. The overall build and posture are realistic, with detailed folds in the clothing and clear separation between garments and accessories.
description: A male construction worker in a light blue uniform with reflective stripes, yellow helmet, and work boots. He wears brown gloves and has a company label on his back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the worker's face, yellow helmet, light blue jacket with reflective stripes, and yellow boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, gloves, and the side seam of the uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large rectangular label on the back of the jacket and the back of the helmet and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the helmet, gloves, and the right seam of the uniform.
